# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

---
Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::VPC"
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
  
  InternetGateway:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::InternetGateway"
    
  VPCDHCPOptions:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::DHCPOptions"
    Properties:
      DomainName: example.com
  
  MySubnet1:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Subnet"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      
  MySubnet2:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Subnet"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
  
  NatGateway1:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::NatGateway"
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatAllocationID.AllocationId
      
  NatGateway2:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::NatGateway"
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatAllocationID1.AllocationId
  
  RouteTable:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::RouteTable"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
    
  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation"
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref MySubnet1
      
  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation"
    Properties:<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref MySubnet2
  
Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: The ID of the created VPC
    Value: !Ref MyVPC
